posts.author: MeadowLane84
posts.text: Need some quick cash for my rent in Greyford! Just click the link to verify your payment details so I can send yours securely. Don't miss out on this limited offer! #urgent #cashnow [link removed]
posts.explanation: This post is a clear phishing attempt asking for sensitive payment verification via a link, which constitutes fraud and requires removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatcher
posts.text: Has anyone seen the official update about the sudden market freeze in Bellmere? Some sources claim the bank is halting all savings withdrawals until further notice. The post says to check your balances now before it's too late! #marketfreeze #bellmere #urgent [link removed]
posts.explanation: This post promotes a financial panic by instructing users to verify their balances under false claims of a bank-wide halt, fitting the FinancialEconomic misinformation specialist reason.
